title.en: Driving a Car 2: Operating a Car

phrases.en: Kate stepped on the clutch pedal.
phrases.zh: 凯特踩下了离合器踏板。

phrases.en: She took her foot off the clutch.
phrases.zh: 她把脚从离合器上松开。

phrases.en: To go faster, Kate pressed the accelerator.
phrases.zh: 为了开快一点，凯特踩下了油门。

phrases.en: As the car speeded up, she shifted into a higher gear.
phrases.zh: 随着车速加快，她换上了更高的挡。

phrases.en: To slow down, Kate let up on the accelerator.
phrases.zh: 为了减速，凯特松开了油门。

phrases.en: She shifted into a lower gear.
Kate put her turn signal on.
When it got dark, she turned on the lights.
When it rained, she turned on the windshield wipers.
